understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current BP35 level (and subsequent levels) by navigating the player to the goal gem tile marked '+', while avoiding spike tiles that end the attempt immediately, within the allowed turn/attempt limits.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT) or a CLICK; after a horizontal move the character auto-travels in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile (o/m/w), hitting a hazard (u/v spikes = instant loss), or reaching the goal (+). CLICK removes a targeted breakable/clickable block (x) without moving the player and can open new fall paths; UNDO reverts the previous action. Each level allows 2 attempts with up to 50 turns per attempt, and state previews (left/right landing and corridor scan) indicate where a move will ultimately land after gravity resolves.
